entries.title: Payment Render Flow
entries.description: Added the new Payment Render flow with the `<YunoPaymentForm>` component and bridge methods (`startRenderFlow`, `showForm`, `submitForm`, `continueRender`) so merchants can embed the payment form inline with full lifecycle control.

entries.title: Enrollment Render Flow
entries.description: Added the Enrollment Render flow with the `<YunoEnrollmentForm>` component for embedded card enrollment, mirroring the Payment Render API.

entries.title: Native SDK Bumps
entries.description: Bumped the underlying native SDKs to Android `2.15.1` and iOS `2.16.0`, bringing the latest payment, enrollment, and security improvements to the React Native wrapper.

entries.title: Android 15 Edge-to-Edge Overlap
entries.description: Configured edge-to-edge on Android 15 to prevent the payment UI from overlapping system bars, and now runs `enableEdgeToEdge` on the UI thread.

entries.title: Samsung One UI Compatibility
entries.description: Uses `setDecorFitsSystemWindows` for Samsung One UI compatibility, preventing layout glitches on affected devices.

entries.title: Seamless Payment Startup Crashes
entries.description: Made native module access fully lazy, ensured payment status events are dispatched on the main thread, safely unwrap the iOS view controller, and resolved a `TurboModuleRegistry` error in seamless flows.

entries.title: Android Status Alignment
entries.description: Aligned Android status values with the TypeScript `YunoStatus` enum and kept render flow status mappings separate from shared mappings.

entries.title: fast-xml-parser DoS Vulnerability
entries.description: Upgraded `fast-xml-parser` to address denial-of-service advisories (VULS-1511 and CVE-2026-25128).

entries.title: CardFlow Configuration Removed
entries.description: The `CardFlow` enum and the `cardFlow` property in `YunoConfig` have been removed. Card form type is now configured from the Yuno Dashboard instead of the client SDK. Remove any `CardFlow` import and `cardFlow` references from your initialization code before upgrading.

entries.title: Native SDK Bumps
entries.description: Bumped the underlying native SDKs to Android `2.11.0` and iOS `2.12.9-RC`.

entries.title: iOS Seamless Payment Flow
entries.description: Switched iOS seamless payments to `startPaymentSeamlessLite`, now resolves promises with the final payment status instead of `PROCESSING`, runs the call on `MainActor`, and uses the `currentLanguage` from `initialize` in `SeamlessParams`.

entries.title: Android removeListeners Crash
entries.description: Fixed an Android crash caused by a type mismatch on `removeListeners`. The parameter type now matches what React Native passes from JS.

entries.title: Android onPaymentSelected Signature
entries.description: Updated the `onPaymentSelected` callback signature to match Android SDK 2.11.0.

entries.title: minimatch ReDoS Vulnerability
entries.description: Updated `minimatch` to resolve a regular-expression denial-of-service (ReDoS) advisory in the dependency tree.

entries.title: TurboModule Support
entries.description: Added TurboModule support for React Native 0.82+ via a new `NativeYunoSdk` codegen spec, while remaining backward compatible with the Old Architecture through a `NativeModules` fallback.

entries.title: New Architecture Preparation
entries.description: Internal updates preparing the package for React Native 0.82+ and the New Architecture (TurboModules). No public API changes; full TurboModule support arrived in 1.0.30.

entries.title: Internal Release Pipeline Updates
entries.description: Maintenance republish with no functional changes. No API changes required.

entries.title: Internal Release Pipeline Updates
entries.description: Maintenance republish with no functional changes. No API changes required.

entries.title: iOS saveCardEnabled Parsing
entries.description: Fixed a typo in the iOS config key parser that prevented `saveCardEnabled` from being applied. The toggle now correctly reaches the native SDK.

entries.title: iOS Podspec Pin
entries.description: Pinned the iOS `YunoSDK` dependency to `2.9.0-r`. No API changes required.

entries.title: iOS Language in Payment Full Flow
entries.description: Fixed iOS Payment Full flow to respect the `language` parameter passed at initialization.

entries.title: iOS CardFlow Initialization
entries.description: Fixed iOS initialization to honor the `cardFlow` configuration parameter that was previously ignored on iOS.

entries.title: Documentation Updates
entries.description: Expanded README documentation. No API changes required.

entries.title: Simplified Language API
entries.description: The `language` parameter now accepts a plain string instead of requiring the `YunoLanguage` enum, simplifying initialization. No migration required for existing integrations using the enum.

entries.title: iOS Language Initialization
entries.description: Fixed iOS initialization to honor the `language` configuration parameter (matching the Android key), while keeping backward compatibility with the legacy `lang` parameter.

entries.title: Android SDK 2.8.1 Callback Compatibility
entries.description: Updated Android callback signatures to be compatible with Android SDK 2.8.1. No API changes required.

entries.title: Internal Release Pipeline Updates
entries.description: Internal version alignment between the React Native wrapper and the underlying native SDK references. No API changes required.

entries.title: Headless Payment Flow
entries.description: Added a Headless Payment Flow for Android and iOS so merchants can drive payment progression from their own UI while delegating native execution to the SDK.

entries.title: Headless Enrollment Flow
entries.description: Added a Headless Enrollment Flow for Android and iOS for card enrollment via custom merchant UI.

entries.title: iOS Payment Full Flow
entries.description: Added Payment Full flow support on iOS with the native `YunoPaymentMethods` component for parity with Android.

entries.title: iOS Native Module for YunoSDK 2.x
entries.description: Updated the iOS native module to YunoSDK 2.x, including correct delegate passing for `startPayment` and `continuePayment` and using the `.succeeded` enum case.

entries.title: iOS Module Registration
entries.description: Fixed the iOS native module registration by adding `moduleName()` and `constantsToExport()` and switching `NativeEventEmitter` to lazy loading, resolving linking issues at startup.

entries.title: OTT and Payment Status Events
entries.description: OTT and payment status events are now emitted from the Full Payment Flow delegate on iOS, and the Android Payment Full flow no longer reports a stale `CANCELLED` status across sessions.

entries.title: CardFlow Default Alignment
entries.description: Aligned the default `CardFlow` value with the native SDK by switching from `MULTI_STEP` to `STEP_BY_STEP` to prevent mismatched card form rendering.
